message:
You found THE spot — and suddenly your dog's back leg is air-pedaling like a tiny bicycle. 🐶🚲 That's the scratch reflex, and your pup honestly can't help it! Nerves just under the skin fire a signal straight to the leg — skipping the brain entirely — to kick away anything that might be a flea or an itch. It's the same automatic wiring as the "knee-jerk" when a doctor taps your knee. So that goofy thumping leg isn't your dog playing along… it's pure involuntary reflex. 🦵

Comment 🐾 if your dog has a magic "kick spot"!
